definitions.text: A set amount of travelling, seen as a single unit; a discrete trip, a voyage.
examples: The journey to London takes two hours by train.
“Don't set out on a journey using someone else's donkey.” ~ African proverb

definitions.text: Any process or progression likened to a journey, especially one that involves difficulties or personal development.
examples: my journey of dealing with grief

definitions.text: The progress of a customer through a system, often a computer system.
examples: We need to map out the user journey and make it more efficient.

definitions.text: To travel, to make a trip or voyage.
The total time spent melting and working one piece.
